---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear description of the observed behavior.

## What you expected

What you thought would happen instead.

## Reproduction

Minimal steps to reproduce. Including the full command line and any relevant
`.ask/` state is usually enough.

```sh
# commands you ran
```

## Environment

- `ask version`:
- OS / arch (e.g. `darwin/arm64`, `linux/amd64`):
- Install path (install script, Homebrew, `go install`, source):
- MCP client (Claude Code, Codex, custom, n/a):

## Additional context

Logs, error messages, screenshots — anything that helps narrow it down.
